thghee.name: T.h.ghee
instructions: Using a spice mill or mortar and pestle, grind marijuana to a fine powder, which will optimize extraction. (If you don’t have a spice mill, break it into very small pieces with your fingers.)

Cook marijuana and butter in a small saucepan over low heat until butter is melted; add 1 cup water and bring to a gentle simmer (the water keeps the mixture from getting too hot, which is key to preventing the herb from burning). Cook, stirring and skimming foam from surface occasionally, 1 hour. (The butter will foam up considerably during the first 30 minutes; use a small but deep pot.)

Strain butter through a fine-mesh sieve into a measuring glass or other wide-mouthed container, pressing on solids; chill until butter is solidified and separates from water, about 4 hours (you can freeze it to speed up this stage).
Use a small spatula or thin-bladed knife to lift butter out of glass, then scrape off any sludge from side that was in contact with water; discard water.

Weigh butter: You should have between 5 and 6 oz. (if you don’t have a scale, melt butter just until liquid again and pour back into measuring glass to check). Add more unsalted butter to bring total amount back to 8 oz.
Do Ahead: Marijuana butter can be made 3 months ahead. Cover and freeze.
This recipe is only intended for those who have obtained marijuana legally under applicable federal and state laws.

taco-soup.name: Taco Soup
instructions: Add the ground beef and onion to a large pot and stir until the beef is cooked through.
Drain excess liquid.
Add the kidney beans, black beans, corn, tomatoes, tomato sauce, and taco seasoning to the pot, and stir until combined.
Cook over medium heat for 10 minutes.
Serve with cheddar cheese, sour cream, pico de gallo, avocado, corn chips, lime wedges, and cilantro.
Enjoy!

tagliatelle-4-cheeses-with-flavored-crea.name: Tagliatelle 4 Cheeses With Flavored Cream
instructions: Cut the cheeses and ham into small frames.
Finely chop the bacon and saute it in an anti-stick pan for 2-3 minutes, until the aroma is removed.
Add 1 clove of garlic and let it perfume for about 1 minute. Then remove it.
Add the cream and let it boil. Remove from heat and add the chopped chives, salt and pepper.
In a pot with salted water, boil the pasta for 2 minutes less than the time in the package.
Drain them in a colander and transfer them to a fireproof vessel. Add some olive oil and mix gently.
Add the cheeses and ham and pour with the perfumed cream.
Bake in a well pre-heated ocean at 2003

tahini-bbq-sauce.name: Tahini Bbq Sauce
instructions: Mix yogurt, tahini, vinegar, parsley, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, water, cayenne pepper, and salt in a bowl until smooth.

tapas-board-teleculinaria.name: Tapas Board

ingredients.item: 2 colheres (sopa)  molho pesto + molho pesto q.b.
Grains of pink pepper and other to taste

instructions: Drain the olives, put them in a bottle, cover with olive oil and add rosemary leaves. Have the roasted peppers cut into strips in a bowl, season with salt and ground pepper and water with olive oil.

Unroll the leafy dough and spread the spoons (soup) in pesto sauce in the center. Put over the camembert cheese and wrap everything with the pastry. Brush with crushed yolk and put it in the oven, preheated at 200°C, until the leaf is well golden.

Take a frying pan to the fire, add the fill of the flour and let it cook. Beat the eggs in a bowl, add to the flour, wrap and let cook until it is to your liking. Put it on a plate and sprinkle it with chopped coriander.
Toss a few slices of bread slightly, scrape one dehulled clove of garlic and put over half the cherry tomatoes cut in half.
Cut the island’s cheese into cubes, lay in a bottle, season with rosemary leaves and pepper beans and cover with olive oil. Crush the curd, have it in a bowl and season with salt and pink pepper.
Cut the remaining cherry tomatoes in half and the mozzarella in slices. Put them on a plate, interspersed with basil leaves. Season with salt and ground pepper.

In a pot, saute the onion and the other garlic chopped in a little olive oil. Add the round tomato sliced into pieces and the naked tomato, season with salt, ground pepper and oregano and let cook very well.
Put the burrata in a glass with olive oil and a little more pesto in another bowl. In a container, have the slices of paio, ham and salami. Serve all the slaps on a board.

tasty-beets.name: Tasty Beets

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Shred beets in a food processor fitted with the shredding blade.
Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add shredded beets; cook and stir until slightly softened, about 5 minutes.
Add water to skillet; cover. Simmer until beets completely softened, about 10 minutes. Stir in balsamic vinegar; season with salt and pepper.

thai-green-curry-with-seafood.name: Thai Green Curry With Seafood

ingredients.prep: finely chopped, dark green parts separated from white and pale green parts

ingredients.item: Fresh red thai chiles or 1 red jalapeño chile

ingredients.prep: peeled, thinly sliced on diagonal (about 1 cup)

instructions: Heat oil in large saucepan over medium heat. Add white and pale green parts of green onions, 1 tablespoon cilantro, and garlic; sauté until tender, about 2 minutes. Add curry paste; cook until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add 1 1/4 cups water, coconut milk, chiles, lime leaves, and fish sauce. Bring to simmer. Add carrot; cover and cook until carrot is just tender, about 5 minutes. Layer bok choy, shrimp, scallops, then mussels in pan. Cover and simmer until mussels open and seafood and bok choy are cooked (discard mussels that do not open), about 5 minutes. Stir in dark green parts of green onions, 2 tablespoons cilantro, and basil.
Divide rice among 4 shallow bowls. Ladle curry over rice and serve.

thanksgiving-turkey-club-sandwich.name: Thanksgiving Turkey Club Sandwich

ingredients.item: . sliced leftover roast turkey or thick-cut deli roast turkey breast
Of green or red leaf lettuce
Treviso radicchio or other chicory leaves

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Place 6 slices bacon on a wire rack set inside a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet and bake until brown and crisp, 15–18 minutes. Remove from oven and set aside.
Mix together ⅓ cup leftover or store-bought cranberry sauce, 2 Tbsp. whole grain mustard, and 1 Tbsp. Dijon mustard in a small bowl.

Spread cranberry mixture over 1 side of 2 slices bread (such as sourdough or Pullman), toasted. Spread half of 1½ Tbsp. mayonnaise over 1 side each of another 2 slices bread (such as sourdough or Pullman), toasted. Divide 12 oz. sliced leftover roast turkey or thick-cut deli roast turkey breast and reserved bacon between bread spread with cranberry mixture, then top each with one of the bread slices spread with mayonnaise, placing mayonnaise side down. Spread remaining 1½ Tbsp. mayonnaise over top sides of slices, then arrange half of ¼ head of green or red leaf lettuce, leaves separated, and 2–3 Treviso radicchio or other chicory leaves (if using) over each. Spread cranberry mixture over 1 side of remaining 2 slices bread (such as sourdough or Pullman), toasted, and place, cranberry mixture side down, on top of lettuce to close sandwich.

the-byrrh-special.name: The Byrrh Special
instructions: Combine Byrrh and gin in a mixing glass, large glass, or cocktail shaker filled with ice; stir until outside of glass is frosty, about 30 seconds.
Strain into a coupe glass and garnish with lemon twist.

the-elvis.name: The Elvis
instructions: Combine grapefruit juice, gin, and liqueur in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice and shake until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a rocks glass filled with ice and top off with ale. Garnish with grapefruit twist.

the-genius-ingredient-for-gooey-cheese-s.name: The Genius Ingredient For Gooey Cheese Sauce
instructions: {'step': 'In a microwave-safe bowl, stir together water and Alka-Seltzer.', 'number': '1'}
{'step': 'Let stand until fizzing stops, about 1 minute.', 'number': '2'}
{'step': 'Add butter to the bowl and microwave until the butter is melted, about 30 seconds.', 'number': '3'}
{'step': 'Add the shredded cheese to the bowl. Microwave in 30-second increments until cheese is melted and bubbly.', 'number': '4'}
{'step': 'Using a fork or small whisk, stir until the sauce is smooth, adding any optional flavorings if desired.', 'number': '5'}
{'step': 'Let stand until perfectly thickened, 1 to 2 minutes.', 'number': '6'}

the-open-faced-breakfast-spamwich-sandwi.name: The Open-faced Breakfast Spamwich Sandwich
instructions: Place pineapple slices in a non-stick skillet over low heat; sprinkle with brown sugar. Cook pineapple, shaking the pan every minute, until bottom of pineapple rings turn golden and sugar is caramelized, about 5 minutes; remove slices from pan and set aside.

Place SPAM with Bacon slices into the same skillet and pour 1/4 cup of reserved pineapple juice over the SPAM with Bacon; cook until juice evaporates, about 3 minutes. Flip SPAM with Bacon; pour remaining pineapple juice in and cook until evaporated, about 3 minutes more.
Crack eggs into a nonstick skillet over medium-low heat; cook until whites are firm and yolks are done to your liking.
Toast bagels; spread bagel halves with mashed avocado. Top each bagel half with tomato slices, SPAM with Bacon slices, an egg, and a pineapple slice; top with just a splash of balsamic vinegar.

the-quickest-and-easiest-plum-jam-to-mak.name: The Quickest And Easiest Plum Jam To Make
the-quickest-and-easiest-plum-jam-to-mak.original_name: La mermelada de ciruela casera más rápida y fácil de hacer

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons pectin powder (you can buy here)

instructions: Peeling and boning pums and cutting them into small pieces.
In a large pot, mix pines with sugar, cinnamon branch, starry anise seeds, lemon juice and pectin powder. The pectin will help to weigh the jam and maintain its consistency.
Cocinar a fuego medio-alto, removiendo regularmente, hasta que la mezcla comience a espesarse.
Bajar el fuego a medio-bajo y continuar cocinando hasta que la mermelada tenga la consistencia deseada.
Remove cinnamon branch and starry anise seeds.
Check if the jam's ready to be tested on a cold plate. If you get a quick solidification, you're ready.
Verter la mermelada caliente en tarros esterilizados y cerrarlos. Dejar enfriar.
Almacenar en un lugar fresco y seco.

the-vespa.name: The Vespa
instructions: Combine 1 ounce London dry gin, 1 ounce vodka, and 1/2 ounce Cocchi Americano (Italian aperitif wine) in a large glass. Fill with ice and stir until glass is very cold, about 1 minute. Strain into a chilled stemmed cocktail glass. Garnish with a grapefruit twist.

three-day-twice-cooked-pork-roast-with-f.name: Three-day, Twice-cooked Pork Roast With Fried-herb Salsa Verde

ingredients.item: To 6 cups homemade chicken stock or water

ingredients.prep: washed, dried, and leaves picked from stems
grill pan, griddle, or cast-iron skillet

instructions: Place pork shoulder on a rimmed baking sheet. Season with 1 tablespoon each kosher salt and freshly ground pepper. Cover pork with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
Preheat oven to 204°C.

Heat a large heavy pot (such as a Dutch oven) over high; add 1/4 cup oil, onion, carrot, and celery. Cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables start to sizzle; reduce heat to medium and cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are soft and lightly browned, about 10 minutes. Add the garlic, herbs, and spices and sauté for 1 minute more. Add the wine and bring to a simmer.
Place the pork on top of the aromatics and add enough stock or water to come halfway up the pork. Bring liquid to a simmer, and then cover pot with a lid or a couple layers of foil.

Transfer pot to oven and cook for 10 minutes; reduce heat to 163°C and cook until the meat is quite tender, about 3 hours. (To test for doneness, insert a slender, sharp knife into the middle of the roast; it should pull out easily.)

When meat is cooked, transfer it to a separate container, reserving the pan juices. Set a colander over a large bowl, and strain the pan juice into the bowl, pressing on the solids to extract all the liquid. Let strained pan juices until fat rises to the top, about 5 minutes. With a small ladle, skim off and discard the fat. Pour the skimmed, strained pan juices over the pork and let cool to room temperature; cover and refrigerate overnight.

One hour before you're ready to serve the pork, remove the meat from its cooking liquid and cut (while still cold) into neat 1-inch slices; set aside. Pour cooking liquid in a medium saucepan; bring to a simmer and reduce by a third. Season to taste, cover, and keep warm.

While your pork comes to room temperature, prepare the salsa verde. Line a large plate with a paper towel, and place it next to the stove, alongside a slotted spoon or "spider" spatula. In a small skillet, heat 1/2 inch of vegetable oil over medium heat. When the oil starts to look swirly, drop in a single rosemary leaf to test for readiness: if it sinks quietly to the bottom, the oil's not ready. When a leaf sizzles, but not in a frantic way, you are ready to fry.

Add the rosemary leaves to the oil and fry until the sizzling subsides, about 1 minute. Using the slotted spoon or spider, scoop the herbs from the oil and place the on the paper-towel-lined plate. Repeat with the sage leaves in the same oil; remove skillet from heat.

On a cutting board, gather the parsley leaves into a ball, holding them down on the cutting board as if they were trying to run away. Slice this parsley bundle thinly, as if it were a single vegetable. As you slice, the ball will come apart, but just bunch it back together as best you can, keep slicing, and you'll have a nice head start on the chopping that remains. Anchor the tip of the knife to the cutting board and use a paper cutter-like motion to chop away at your pile. Go over it a couple of times, then slide the knife under, like a spatula, and flip it over. Continue chopping and flipping until the parsley is finely chopped; transfer to a medium bowl.

Render the garlic a paste by either pounding it in a mortar with a pinch of salt, or with a knife on a cutting board, again with salt. When the garlic is almost a thick liquid, transfer it the bowl with the parsley; add the fried herbs and the olive oil. Stir salsa verde to combine, adding more salt or oil as needed.

Heat a grill, grill pan, griddle, or cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat. When hot, coat the grill or pan with 1 tablespoon vegetable oil. Working in batches and adding more oil as needed, cook until well browned and crispy on both sides, about 2 minutes per side.

Pour the reduced pan juices onto a serving platter with the pork (but not over the slices or they will lose some crispness) and arrange pork slices on top. Serve with salsa verde spooned over the top, or served alongside.

thuppa-anna.name: Thuppa Anna

ingredients.item: Cooked sona masuri or basmati rice
Fresh or frozen grated coconut or dried unsweetened shredded coconut
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: If using freshly cooked rice, spread it out on a baking sheet and let cool. This will ensure that the grains will stay separate.

If using dried coconut, place in a small bowl and pour in hot water just to cover (coconut should absorb all the liquid, so you don’t need to drain); let sit until coconut is plump, at least 10 minutes.
Melt ½ tsp. ghee in a wok or large skillet with a lid over medium heat. Toast cashews, stirring often, until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Transfer to paper towels and let cool.

Melt remaining 2 Tbsp. ghee in same wok, then add a mustard seed. As soon as the oil around the seed starts to sizzle or the seed moves, carefully add remaining mustard seeds, then urad dal (if using) and asafetida. Quickly cover pan and cook, shaking, until mustard seeds start popping more gradually, about 30 seconds. Uncover pan and continue to cook, stirring constantly, until urad dal turns a reddish golden brown and smells nutty, about 45 seconds; watch it closely so dal doesn’t burn. (If you aren’t using the dal, cook mustard seeds and asafetida until seeds are popping, reduce heat to low, and immediately add curry leaves and chile as directed below.)

Reduce heat to low. Rub curry leaves between your fingers to release their natural oils and carefully add to wok along with chile. Cover immediately (moisture from the curry leaves will cause the ghee to spatter). Once spattering subsides, uncover and stir to evenly coat.

Add rice to wok and stir to coat. Mix in coconut and salt. Cook, stirring often, until heated through, about 4 minutes. Mix about three fourths of cashews into rice. Remove from heat; taste thuppa anna and season with more salt if needed. Top with remaining cashews.

thyme-roasted-apples-and-onions.name: Thyme-roasted Apples And Onions

ingredients.item: Coarse kosher salt plus additional for sprinkling

ingredients.prep: halved through root end, each half cut into 6 wedges
peeled, halved, cored, each half cut into 4 wedges

instructions: Boil cider in large saucepan until reduced to 2/3 cup, about 28 minutes. Whisk in butter. Season glaze with 1 teaspoon coarse salt. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 week ahead. Cover; chill. Rewarm; whisk before using.

Position 1 rack in top third and 1 rack in bottom third of oven; preheat to 218°C. Butter 2 large rimmed baking sheets. Toss onions in large bowl with 2 teaspoons thyme and 3 tablespoons glaze. Arrange in single layer on 1 sheet. Toss apples in same bowl with 2 teaspoons thyme and 3 tablespoons glaze. Arrange in single layer on second sheet. Sprinkle onions and apples with coarse salt and pepper.

Roast onions on upper oven rack 10 minutes. Place apples on bottom rack. Roast onions and apples 20 minutes. Remove both sheets from oven. Drizzle remaining glaze evenly over onions and apples. Reverse position of sheets. Roast 20 minutes longer.

Increase oven temperature to 246°C. Roast onions and apples until tender and slightly caramelized, watching closely to prevent burning, about 10 minutes longer. Transfer onions and apples to large bowl. Season with coarse salt and pepper. Sprinkle with remaining 2 teaspoons thyme.

tiramisu-without-eggs-argiro.name: Tiramisu Without Eggs

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons of amaretto or other liqueur of your liking
500 grit cream light at room temperature
4 tsp sugar (maybe a little extra at will)
500 gritt cream or cream with 36% fat
3 tablespoons of amaretto or other liqueur of your liking
500 grit cream light at room temperature
4 tsp sugar (maybe a little extra at will)
500 gritt cream or cream with 36% fat

instructions: We use a 33×24 million baking pan.
First beat the frozen cream with a hand mixer until it stabilizes. Keep it in the refrigerator until we make the dessert.
Add coffee and sugar, amaretto and boiling water to a bowl.
Mix and let it cool.
Dip the savayar cookies in the coffee and make a layer on the baking pan (each layer is 1 pack).
In a bowl, add the cheese and sugar and beat with the mixer until fluffy, at low speed for 1 to 2 minutes.
Add the whipped cream.
Mix with a wire to homogenize the two mixtures.

tofu-and-mixed-vegetable-skewers-recipe-.name: Tofu And Mixed Vegetable Skewers Recipe
tofu-and-mixed-vegetable-skewers-recipe-.original_name: Receta de brochetas de tofu y vegetales mixtos
instructions: We started our recipe by preparing the vegetables. We cut the pumpkin into big pieces. The eggplant, pepper and onion have been cut into pieces. We also clear the mushrooms and leave them whole.
In a big bowl, mix olive oil, soybean sauce, lemon juice, powder cumin, smoked peppermint, salt and pepper.
Add tofu to the mixture and seabirds for at least 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
Ensarta los trozos de tofu y las verduras en brochetas, alternando los ingredientes para un aspecto visual atractivo.
Precalienta la parrilla o el horno a temperatura media-alta.
It cooks the knipes, sometimes spinning them and clicking with the remaining marinade, till the tofu is golden and the vegetables are tender but still crispy.
Retiro la brocketas del fuego and serve them hot, sprinkled with fresh minced herbs.

tomato-butter.name: Tomato Butter
instructions: Preheat broiler.
Broil tomatoes until skins blister and juices are released; let cool.
Transfer to a food processor; season with salt.
Purée until coarsely chopped, then stir into butter.

tomato-basil-sauce-with-polenta.name: Tomato-basil Sauce With Polenta
instructions: Arrange racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 425°. Line a large rimmed baking sheet with foil and brush with 1 Tbsp. oil. Arrange polenta rounds on oiled sheet.

Very coarsely chop (do not purée) half the tomatoes in a food processor. Cut remaining tomatoes in half (quarter if large). Combine tomatoes in a bowl with 4 Tbsp. oil and remaining ingredients. Toss to coat.

Stack three 24x12" sheets of parchment paper on another baking sheet. (Don't use foil—the tomato acid will react with aluminum.) Spoon tomato mixture onto one side of stacked parchment. Fold parchment layers over mixture and crimp edges tightly to form a sealed packet.

Place baking sheet with tomato packet on upper rack and sheet with polenta on lower rack. Bake, turning polenta rounds once, until polenta is light golden and tomatoes are saucy (carefully open packet to check; steam will escape), 25–30 minutes. (You can also cook polenta in a grill pan or on a charcoal or gas grill.)
Spoon tomato sauce over polenta.

traditional-meat-pie-gizlemopita-argiro.name: Traditional Meat Pie (gizlemopita)

ingredients.item: 1 kg of beef (or beef and lamb mix)
5 small leeks (or 2 large) tenderly in slices
1 kg of beef (or beef and lamb mix)
5 small leeks (or 2 large) tenderly in slices

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a wide and shallow pot.
Add the chopped meat or minced meat and brown it for 6-7 minutes to drink its liquids.
Add the chopped leeks and finely chopped onions. Leave them on medium heat to wilt for a few minutes, without color. From time to time, stir.
Salt and pepper and withdraw from the fire.
Add the petoura (traditional chlopites Kozani) and mix.
Allow the filling to cool for a few minutes.
Beat the eggs with milk or yogurt and add them to the filling by mixing.
If we want, add a little chopped parsley. Mix the filling.
In shadow, large baking pan for pie, 40 cm (or 35×28 cm long baking pan) apply some olive oil.
Apply three radial leaves , sprinkle them in between with a few drops of olive oil. Make sure the leaves are quite prominent from the baking pan.
Empty the filling and with a spoon spread it into a thin layer.
Cover with 1 sheet, slightly wrinkled. Drizzle with olive oil. Cover with the last leaf, slightly wrinkled.
Inwardly turn the edges that stand out on the pie and turn into a loose pit.
Add a large glass to the center of the pie and make a circle around it with a sharp knife. We do not carve down, but only the top leaves.
Radially, divide the pie into 12 pieces. Drizzle with the remaining olive oil and sprinkle the surface with some water.
Bake the pie in a well preheated evening at 1803 In the last 10 minutes we only make with the lower residence for a crisper result.
The pie is ready when it is well browned and completely removed from the baking pan.

triple-citrus-tuna-steak.name: Triple Citrus Tuna Steak

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Prepare marinade: Whisk orange juice, lime juice, lemon juice, red onion, habanero pepper, vinegar, garlic, and oregano together in a bowl large enough to hold the tuna steaks.
Prepare salsa: Combine mango, red onion, cilantro, salt, and pepper in a separate bowl. Set aside.
Prepare tuna: Sprinkle tuna with salt and pepper. Place in the bowl with the marinade and turn to coat. Marinate for about 30 minutes.
While tuna is marinating, crush potato chips as fine as possible in a blender. Transfer to a bowl.
Remove tuna from the marinade and press into the crushed chips until both sides are well coated.
Heat heavy-bottomed nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add butter and heat until butter melts and foam subsides. Add tuna and sear for 2 to 3 minutes on each side. Remove from the skillet.
To serve, top tuna with chile sauce and serve with jasmine rice and mango salsa.

tuna-cannelloni-teleculinaria.name: Tuna Cannelloni
instructions: Scal the cannellons in boiling water, seasoned with salt, for 3 minutes, and then pass them by cold water. Reserve.

Light a pot with the oil, garlic and onion, chopped, and the leek, cut into fine half-moons. When you're golden, add the peeled tomatoes and let them know. Add the courgette, previously grated (shelled or unshelled), and stir.

Remove half of the previous preparation and book. Shortly thereafter, to the saute that was left in the pot, add the tuna run and season with salt, pepper and oregano. Remove from the fire, mix the cream cheese and retrieve the seasonings.

Garnish an oven tray (30x20 cm) with butter and spread half the sauce you have reserved. Fill the cannellons with the tuna and cheese preparation using a pastry bag or a dessert spoon. Have them on the tray and cover with the rest of the sauce. Take it to the oven, preheated at 180°C, until gratin.

tuna-tray-with-grain-teleculinaria.name: Tuna Tray With Grain
instructions: Descasque, pique a cebola e os alhos e aloure-os num tacho com o azeite e o louro. Quando a cebola ficar transparente, adicione o tomate, previamente picado, mexa e cozinhe durante 5 minutos.

Add the tuna, drained and slightly undone, and stir. Drain a can of grain and join the pot. Also add the contents of the other can without dripping the grain. Stir and let cook, in mild heat, for 10 minutes. In the end, correct the salt and add a pinch of pepper.
Have the previous preparation in an oven container, sprinkle it with the cheese and put it in the oven, preheated to 180° c, until gratin.

tuna-with-onions-with-tomato-comedera.name: Tuna With Onions With Tomato

ingredients.item: 1 ½ glass of dry white wine
3 tazas de salsa de tomate (casera, de preferencia)

instructions: To start with, we'll care about the fish. If necessary, we'll remove his skin and his thorns. If they have been with us at the fishing industry, so much better.

Two schools have been established with respect to the production of fish: the one that keeps complete steaks and cuts them into big cubes (each as for a snack). That's at every cook's choice. In either case, we will be pounding up the tuna and have it in a bin where we can briefly sail with white wine.
We'll place the fish and wine so that the first can absorb the liquid. We'll keep them in the refrigerator for a few minutes while we advance other stages of the recipe.
Then we'll peel and mince the onions into Jolian. We will also peel our garlic teeth and mingle them into as thin as we can.
En el caso de los pimientos, los lavaremos y retiraremos ciertas partes de la verdura: las semillas, el interior blanco, la rama. Luego los cortaremos en cintas, a lo largo (juliana).

In a frying pan big enough, we will warm up some oil, to soften onion and garlic. We'll keep our fire between and low, to stop our vegetables from passing. We'll have to get back and forth. The goal is for the onion to start to become slightly clear.
We will add to the cooking the pipes and we will pour the remaining half glass of wine. We'll let them cook about 3 more minutes.
Luego sacaremos el pescado del refrigerador y lo incorporaremos. Haremos que se cocine muy brevemente para que tome un poco de color, por ambas caras.
Entonces agregaremos la salsa de tomate.

We will also add the laurel leaf and cover the frying pan to leave everything cooking for ten minutes (15, if they have not cut the tuna). It's preferably best to avoid getting too far from the kitchen and monitoring cooking from time to time. Even, it's a good idea to stir her up a little.
After cooking time, we will remove the cover and add a hot parsley and sweet pepper to the sauce.
We'll figure something out and we'll prove the result. The date may have to be rectified with more salt and pepper.

turkey-biryani.name: Turkey Biryani

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt
. kashmiri or other red chile powder
Plus 2 tbsp. ghee or vegetable oil

instructions: Rinse 2 cups basmati rice in a mesh sieve or a colander under cold running water until water runs clear. Transfer to a medium bowl and pour in cold water to cover by at least 1"; let sit at room temperature 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, mix 2 lb. cooked turkey meat, chopped into bite-size pieces (about 6 cups), 6 garlic cloves, finely chopped, one 2" piece ginger, peeled, finely chopped, 1 cup plain whole-milk yogurt, 2 Tbsp. plus 2 tsp. garam masala, 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 Tbsp. tomato paste, 1½ tsp. ground coriander, 1 tsp. Kashmiri or other chile powder (such as cayenne), and 1 tsp. ground cumin in a medium bowl. Taste and season with more salt if needed; set turkey mixture aside.

Melt ⅔ cup ghee in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over high heat. Add 4 medium onions, thinly sliced, and cook, stirring often, until dark golden brown and just starting to crisp, 25–35 minutes. Remove from heat and transfer half of onions to paper towels with a slotted spoon; let drain. Set remaining onions aside in pot.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Pour water into a medium saucepan to fill by three quarters; salt generously. Drain rice and place in saucepan. Add 2 dried bay leaves, one 2" cinnamon stick, 6 whole cloves, and 5 green cardamom pods. Set over high heat and bring to a boil. Immediately reduce heat to medium and simmer until rice is mostly cooked (it should still have some chew in the center), about 5 minutes. Drain rice and rinse under cold running water. Shake sieve to remove excess water from rice; set aside.

Add remaining 2 Tbsp. ghee to reserved onions in pot and melt over medium heat. Add reserved turkey mixture and cook, gently stirring occasionally, until turkey is warmed through and starting to brown in a few spots, about 4 minutes. Stir in 1 cup whole milk and bring to a gentle simmer. Add reserved rice, arranging in an even layer, and top with ⅔ cup golden raisins. (Do not stir; you want to keep layers distinct.) Cover and bake 20 minutes.

Remove pot from heat and let biryani sit, covered, 8 minutes. Uncover, top with ⅓ cup unsalted roasted cashews, coarsely chopped, 2 cups coarsely chopped mint, and drained fried onions. Mix biryani thoroughly, scraping bottom, to serve.
Do Ahead: Turkey mixture can be made 12 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

turkey-meat-pasta-lezzet.name: Turkey Meat Pasta
instructions: 1. Shake pasta in plenty of salty water and strain water.
2. Take the cooked meats to the pan and walk 3 tablespoons of olive oil on it.
3. Close the cover and cook it in jealous fire.
4. Peel the bark and cut in strip.
5. Clean the cores of peppers and swamp in strip and sauce it in olive oil with carrot.
6.  Bezelye ve hindi etlerini ekleyin.
7. Taste with salt and pepper.
8. Mix the mixture with pasta.
9. Reindeed parmesan cheese on it and serve hot.

turkey-recipe-stuffed-with-apples-and-ci.name: Turkey Recipe Stuffed With Apples And Cinnamon
turkey-recipe-stuffed-with-apples-and-ci.original_name: Receta de pavo relleno con manzanas y canela

ingredients.item: 1  pavo entero de 5 a 6 kg limpio
1 cda de hierbas de provenza o romero
1 cup of bread in cubes (preferably from the previous day)
1/2 taza de caldo de pollo o pavo

instructions: In a large frying pan, melt a tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add apples, onion, celery and carrots, pounding them up till they are tender (about 5 minutes).
Add bread with cubes, nuts, cinnamon, dark sugar, salt and pepper. Cooking for another two minutes.
Agrega el caldo y mezcla bien hasta que el pan absorba la humedad. Retira del fuego y deja enfriar.
It purifies the oven to 180 been 3 been (177 been 3).
Seca el pavo por dentro y por fuera con toallas de papel. Luego, frota la mantequilla derretida sobre toda la piel del pavo.
Sazona el pavo con sal, pimienta, ajo en polvo y hierbas de Provenza o romero.
Rellena el interior del pavo con la mezcla de manzanas y canela.
Put the turkey on a baking plate and cover it slightly with aluminum paper.
In a small saucer, heats up the apple cider, honey and cinnamon branch. It cooks with a low heat until the mixture thickens slightly, stirring occasionally.
Wet the turkey for 3.5 to 4 hours and sprinkle it every 45 minutes with cider glazing.
Retire the foil paper in the last 30 minutes so that the skin gets golden and crispy.
Once ready, get the turkey out of the oven and let it stand for 20 minutes before cutting.
Serves the turkey with the pilling and enjoys its warm and Christmas flavour.

turkey-stuffing-soup.name: Turkey Stuffing Soup
instructions: Melt butter in a stockpot over low heat. Add celery, carrots, and onion; cook and stir until tender, 8 to 10 minutes.
Stir in turkey, stuffing, tomatoes, and parsley. Pour in turkey stock. Bring soup to a boil; reduce heat and simmer, partially covered, until flavors combine, about 1 hour.
Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook egg noodles in the boiling water, stirring occasionally until tender yet firm to the bite, 7 to 9 minutes. Drain.
Scoop hot noodles into deep serving bowls; ladle soup on top.

turkey-tacos.name: Turkey Tacos
instructions: Heat a large skillet over high heat. Once hot, add a drizzle of oil to coat the bottom of the pan. Add the ground turkey and break apart with a spatula. Add the taco seasoning, salt, and pepper and stir, cooking until the meat has browned and is fully cooked through.
Stir in the tomatoes. Bring to a gentle simmer and cook for about 5 minutes, then remove from the heat.
Scoop the turkey mixture into tortillas and top with shredded lettuce, shredded cheese, and sliced avocado.
Enjoy!

turmeric-and-coconut-braised-cabbage-wit.name: Turmeric And Coconut-braised Cabbage With Chickpeas

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: cilantro leaves, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: To start, prep your ingredients: Slice ½ medium head of green cabbage (about 2 lb.) through core to make 4 wedges. Peel and finely chop 2 medium shallots (about 4 oz.). Peel one 1" piece ginger with a spoon and finely chop. Using the side of your knife, crush 2 garlic cloves, remove and discard papery skins, and finely chop. Halve 1 serrano or other green chile lengthwise and, if you don’t want it too hot, scrape out seeds and white membrane with the back of the knife; discard. If you prefer some heat, leave as is. Finely chop chile. Set shallots, ginger, garlic, and chile aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large high-sided skillet with lid or wide Dutch oven over medium-high. Add cabbage, cut side down, and season with kosher salt. Cook, undisturbed, until lightly charred underneath, about 5 minutes. Turn over and cook, undisturbed, until charred, about 5 minutes. Transfer cabbage to a plate.
Shake one 13.5-oz. can unsweetened coconut milk to ensure it’s well mixed; open can. Open one 15.5-oz. can chickpeas and rinse in a colander under running water.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in same skillet over medium-high. Add reserved shallots, ginger, garlic, and chile, and cook, stirring with a wooden spoon, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add 1 tsp. brown mustard seeds, 1 tsp. ground cumin, and 1 tsp. turmeric powder and cook, stirring, until mustard seeds are popping, about 1 minute.
Add coconut milk, chickpeas, ½ cup vegetable stock or water, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Stir to combine.

Place cabbage wedges back into pan and, using a large spoon, baste cabbage with coconut milk; bring mixture to a boil. Cover, reduce heat to low, and cook until cabbage is tender, 15–20 minutes. Taste and season with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Scoop some steamed white rice into each bowl and divide cabbage and chickpeas over; top with cilantro leaves. Serve with lime wedges, for squeezing over.

turmeric-and-ginger-smoothie-recipe-come.name: Turmeric And Ginger Smoothie Recipe
turmeric-and-ginger-smoothie-recipe-come.original_name: Receta de smoothie de cúrcuma y jengibre

ingredients.item: 1 cdita de jengibre (fresco rallado o en polvo)

instructions: Peel the banana and cut into slices.
It incorporates into the blender the cut banana, the turmeric and ginger.
Pour the orange juice, honey and pint of pepper. He's good at his license till his drink's consistent.
Agrega los cubos de hielo y procesa hasta darle la textura de smoothie.
Serve and accompany with cuts of orange. Enjoy!

typhoon-shelter-corn-ribs.name: Typhoon Shelter Corn Ribs

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. plus 1 0.5 tsp. light or regular soy sauce

instructions: Toast ½ cup panko in a dry wok or medium skillet over medium heat, tossing often, until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl and add ¼ cup store-bought fried garlic, ¼ tsp. finely ground white pepper, ¼ tsp. MSG or shiitake mushroom powder, ½ tsp. sugar, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt; mix to combine. Set panko mixture aside. Wipe out and reserve wok.

Using a cleaver or chef’s knife, trim 2 ears of corn, husked, then cut in half crosswise. Working one at a time, stand each piece on a cut end and slice vertically through core into quarters, resting the knife’s cutting edge on corn and knocking the back of knife with your hand to force it through core. (You should have 8 wedges per ear.)
Cook corn in a medium pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until kernels are tender, about 5 minutes; drain, shaking off excess water.
Meanwhile, stir 1 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. light or regular soy sauce, 1 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. well-stirred chili crisp, and remaining ½ tsp. sugar in a small bowl until sugar is dissolved.

Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in reserved wok over high until beginning to smoke. Cook 2 scallions, cut into 2" pieces, one 2" piece ginger, peeled, finely chopped, 4 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, and 2 red Thai chiles, thinly sliced, stirring constantly, until garlic is golden brown, about 1 minute. Immediately add corn and soy sauce mixture. Cook, tossing constantly, until corn is lightly browned, about 30 seconds. Remove from heat and add reserved panko mixture; toss to combine.

Transfer corn ribs to a medium bowl.
Do Ahead: Panko mixture can be made 2 weeks ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
